summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of VakilSetu application UI and authentication improvements. All navbar functionality, public access, role-based routing, and auth flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Public services page access (no auth required)
Navbar visibility on all pages with correct elements
Navbar shows Login/Signup button when not logged in
Navbar shows Services link on all pages
Client login flow and redirect to client dashboard
Lawyer login flow and redirect to lawyer dashboard
Navbar shows user profile and logout button after login
Navbar shows role-specific Cases link (My Cases for client, Cases for lawyer)
Login button hidden after successful login
Logout functionality and redirect to homepage
Protected route access control (redirects to login when not authenticated)
Role-based routing restrictions (client can't access lawyer dashboard and vice versa)
Services page cards functionality and navigation
Client dashboard multi-step case submission form (5 steps)
Case form validation and successful submission
Service card buttons redirect based on user role
Public pages remain accessible after logout
